provider: HKUST 2025/26 BBA in Economics Major and School Requirements
note: This supplement is cohort-specific to students admitted in 2025-26. It records the three Major Required courses, every coded alternative in the 2025-26 School of Business and Management requirements, and the 2025-26 ECON 4000-level course-catalog snapshot used to make the open elective pool browsable. The Major rule remains open: choose any 3 ECON 4000-level courses for at least 11 credits; the catalog snapshot is not a permanent closed graduation pool and actual eligibility remains subject to prerequisites, exclusions, approvals and offering. ECON 4959 and ECON 4999 carry official variable 1-4 credits, so their local credits value is 0 rather than assuming either endpoint. ECON 4284 is retained for this cohort because it appears in the 2025-26 catalog, while its removal from the 2026-27 catalog is recorded explicitly. Recommended Year and semester values come only from the official 2025-26 normative pathway; anonymous elective-credit placements are not assigned to individual catalog courses. University Common Core, English and Legal Education requirements are outside this Programme-local coded list, so these rows must not be treated as a graduation-completion decision.
